experience.description: Developing high-end bypass solutions for Free Fire, focusing on packet manipulation and anti-cheat evasion.
Analyzing game binaries and network protocols to identify vulnerabilities and create stable modifications.

projects.title: AI Career Assistant
projects.description: An AI-powered career guidance platform helping students discover academic streams based on marks and interests using Groq Llama AI.
projects.longDescription: Built using Groq Llama-3.3-70B for intelligent analysis and Flux-1-Schnell for visual roadmap generation. The platform features a 3-step assessment system and a persistent AI mentor chatbot to guide students through their educational journey.
features: Persistent AI Chatbot with MongoDB History

projects.title: Carbon Analyzer
projects.description: A comprehensive carbon footprint analyzer application built with Flutter and Python for environmental impact tracking.
projects.longDescription: A cross-platform mobile and desktop application that allows users to track and analyze their carbon footprint. Features a robust Python backend for data processing and a clean Dart/Flutter interface for visualization.

projects.title: Bypass & Security Suite
projects.description: Advanced system-level tools focusing on packet manipulation, kernel-level interception, and anti-cheat evasion.
projects.longDescription: Developed sophisticated bypass solutions utilizing WinDivert for kernel-level packet manipulation and mitmproxy for local traffic modification. Specialized in creating stable, hard-to-detect tools for Windows environments.

hero.description: Specializing in Full-Stack Development, Game Security, and AI-Driven Applications.

about.description: I am a multi-disciplinary engineer with deep expertise in full-stack development, system architecture, and cybersecurity. From building AI-powered career assistants to kernel-level network interceptors, I focus on creating robust, high-performance applications that push the boundaries of modern technology.
